notes: Report-aligned LiveCodeBench v6 Jan-Apr 2025 result using the 175-question denominator.
The local review artifact contains 170 reviewed rows; five missing samples are counted wrong in the 175-question denominator.
All recipe decisions use loop algorithms only; the single-model low-risk route was removed before this run.
The primary scorecard includes Fugu technical-report baselines plus user-provided public model context rows for DeepSeek-R1-0528, Gemini-2.5-Pro-05-06, and Qwen3-235B-A22B.
GPQA-Diamond uses the existing 50-question ReMoM loop result as the current VSR 1.0 Pro score.
LiveCodeBench now uses the report-aligned v6 Jan-Apr 2025 175-question denominator; the score is 92.6 with five missing samples counted wrong.
LiveCodeBench VSR 1.0 open-model comparison should use OpenRouter moonshotai/kimi-k2.7-code rather than the earlier GLM 5.2 plan.
HLE, SWE Bench Pro, TerminalBench, and SciCode require new benchmark-specific auto recipes before they are re-added to the current matrix.
